headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Kraft Heinz, Lowers Price Target to $23
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Chris Carey   maintains Kraft Heinz (NASDAQ:KHC) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $25 to $23.
